strings.tutorial_body:
This tool predicts every possible reward before you spend a single gold.

[b]How to read it:[/b]
Each row shows what you'd get after clicking gold that many times first. Row 0 = click right now. Row 5 = click 5 golds first, then pick. Higher row = more gold spent first.

[b]How to use it:[/b]
[color=#FF6B35]1. Find the card or relic you want â€” scan or use the search dropdowns[/color]
[color=#FF6B35]2. Click that row to set it as your target[/color]
[color=#FF6B35]3. Follow the green plan shown at the bottom[/color]

[b]Pro tips:[/b]
â€˘ Use the dropdown filters to instantly find and plan a path to any reward
â€˘ Hover any card/relic name for details; right-click for a full preview popup
â€˘ Drag panels to reposition; click â–Ľ to collapse

Pure info tool â€” does not change any game mechanics.
